po_number_format_shift.note: PO numbering system changed. Old 7xxx series dominant 2015-2019. New 5xxx series dominant 2020-2025.

post_2020_primary: 10.0 Program Management/1.0 FEP/Matl/ (monthly PR & PO xlsx)

diagnosis_detail.root_cause: Agent-B's populate script processed source_metadata rows correctly, but the po_date extraction logic is tuned for the zzSEMS ARCHIVE folder/filename date patterns (YYYY-MM-DD in path). The newer 2020-2025 procurement uses different date embedding: contract period labels ('1 Aug 23 - 31 Jul 24'), monthly file naming ('2024 01 PR & PO'), and MM.DD.YYYY receipt dates. The extractor runs but leaves po_date null for these rows, so they don't appear in the date-filtered output.
evidence: retrieval_metadata has 47 rows with po_number for 2023-2025 paths
file_state has 371 PO-family files with 2023-2025 path dates
Monthly PR & PO xlsx for all 12 months of 2024 exist but produced no po_date rows
PO number format shifted from 7xxx to 5xxx around 2020 — extractor may have PO-number regex bias
populate output has po_date max = 2022-02-28 despite newer files existing
diagnosis_detail.not_genuine_absence: 2023-2025 PO documents exist in both the raw corpus (E:) and the indexed metadata (C:). The gap is extraction, not data.
